reasons: sees Waymo disrupting market share over time
probably multiple winners for ridesharing since it's a huge market
mentions.text:
@halldj00 I'd frame it more of $UBER + $NBIS Avride vs. $TSLA vs. $GOOGL Waymo. 

Tesla has its standalone app. Waymo has a standalone app. Both are competing vs Uber (which has the largest network)

If I were Uber, I'd grow with Avride on this so they don't just funnel users to Waymo's app. 

Probably multiple winners (eg. $LYFT + $UBER) for ridesharing since it's a huge market.
